strengths: 17+ years of professional full-stack development with strong TypeScript, Node.js, MongoDB, and AWS CDK experience across multiple production roles
Active AI agent infrastructure work at current role including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks — the hardest requirement to find
Deep engineering culture: TDD practitioner, trunk-based development, code review advocate, workshop organizer, and conference speaker
concerns: NestJS is absent from the resume entirely despite being the primary backend framework for this role
React experience appears limited to a single role at Optilyz; no evidence of deep frontend architecture ownership
Kotlin is not mentioned anywhere; Java appears only in passing for embedded and robotics contexts, not backend services
response.justification: Bogdan is a strong generalist engineer with direct overlap on the core stack (TypeScript, Node.js, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, Kubernetes) and, crucially, hands-on AI agent infrastructure work at his current role — the most differentiating requirement on the list. His engineering practices (TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, open-source contributions) align well with a team building internal automation tooling. The main gaps are NestJS (the primary framework), substantive React depth, and Kotlin — all learnable but representing real onboarding cost. The seniority, culture fit, and AI agent experience make an interview worth having to probe those gaps directly.
